conversation.user: Taking a React course on Udemy. 180 lectures, about 24 hours total. No deadline, just learning for fun. Maybe 1 hour a day.

expectedAI.reason: 기존 HTML/CSS/JS 수준에 따라 초반 섹션 스킵 가능 여부 결정 → 실질 강의 수 변경
mustDiagnose: no deadline → sustainable pace + build days critical
mustNotDo: plan 바로 생성 (사전 지식 수준 미확인)
180개 개별 강의 단위 계획 (섹션 기반 마일스톤 필요)

conversation.user: I know basic HTML and CSS from school. JavaScript is still new to me though.

expectedAI.diagnosis: 3 lectures/day × 18min = ~54min → fits within 60min. HTML/CSS known → skip HTML/CSS sections but JS sections needed. No deadline → sustainable pace with weekly Build Days.
expectedAI.strategy: Section-based milestones: skip HTML/CSS basics, start from JS fundamentals. 3-4 lectures/day on weekdays. 1 Build Day per week (no lecture, build something with that week's concepts). Tutorial Hell prevention: build > watch ratio matters.
expectedAI.honestAssessment: 180 lectures at 3/day ≈ 60 days (2 months). With Build Days (1/week), realistic completion ~10 weeks. No rush — consistency beats speed for self-learning.

alternatives.label: Build 중심
alternatives.change: 2 lectures/day + 매주 2일 Build Day → 실습 비중 40%

diagnosis.mustReflectInPlan: section-based milestones with Build Days, not 180 individual lecture tracking

emotion.toneExpected: encouraging and fun; realistic about portfolio timeline; build-focused
